title: lora_l2.c:848 deinit RX thread join failure logged but ignored
description: Contract observation: lichen_lora_l2_deinit() - Lines 848-858 log RX thread join failure but proceed with cleanup. This is documented as best-effort recovery. The code is intentionally accepting the risk. However, this could leave the RX thread accessing freed/reinitialized resources after deinit returns. WHY: Potential use-after-free if thread didn't actually terminate. HOW to fix: Document that callers should reboot if deinit logs this warning, or return error code to indicate incomplete deinit.
close_reason: Fixed deinit RX thread join failure contract: abort-recovery join failures now leave lora_l2 aborted and return an error instead of proceeding with unsafe cleanup; normal STOPPED deinit skips the abort-only join.
